title: AActor & Components
description: Master AActor lifecycle, component hierarchies, component replication, and actor spawning in Unreal C++.
learningObjectives: Identify key actor lifecycle hooks (PostInitializeComponents, BeginPlay, Tick, EndPlay)
Instantiate and attach scene and actor components in C++ constructors
Spawn actors dynamically using the World Spawning API

sections.title: Actor Components and Spawning
sections.content: An `AActor` is any object that can be placed or spawned in a level. Actors are composite structures containing `UActorComponent` instances. Components are divided into Scene Components (having a spatial transform like static meshes or lights) and Actor Components (pure logic components like inventories or health counters). Actor construction is registered via `CreateDefaultSubobject` in constructors.

sections.title: Constructing and Attaching Components
